                }
.social-circle {
                background-color: #000000;
            }

                fill: #ffffff;
            }

                background-color: #000000;
            }

                color: #ffffff;

</style><style>.mdc-card a:link, .seetickets-calendar-event-title a:link, .seetickets-list-event-content-container .event-info-block a:link, .slider-event-title a:link { color: #FFF; }

.seetickets-buy-btn, .seetickets-load-more-btn {
	border: 3px solid #8e1f1f;
	font-family: Poppins, sans-serif;
	font-weight: 700;
}
.seetickets-buy-btn:hover, .seetickets-load-more-btn:hover {
	font-weight: 700;
	color: #00aeef !important;
	background-color: transparent;
	border: 3px solid #00aeef;
}

.buy-and-share-block.position-absolute {
	top: 1rem;
	right: 1rem;
	font-size: 12px;
}
.list-view-events p,
.list-view-events .event-date {
	font-size: 18px;
	line-height: 22px;
	font-weight: 400;
	color: #cecece;}

.seetickets-list-event-container * {
	color: #cecece;}

.list-view-events .event-date { margin-bottom:2rem;}
.list-view-events .event-header,
.list-view-events .doortime-showtime,
.list-view-events .venue,
.list-view-events .genre,
.list-view-events .ages-price,
.list-view-events .buy-and-share-block{ font-size: 14px;}

.list-view-events:not(.with-calendar) .seetickets-calendar-event-title a, .list-view-events:not(.with-calendar)  .seetickets-list-event-content-container .event-info-block a, .slider-event-title a { font-size: 38px !important; font-weight: 700 !important;
	line-height: 38px !important; color: #fff !important; }
.event-info-block {
	max-width: 70%;
}

.seetickets-calendar-container table tbody tr>td, .seetickets-calendar-container table tbody tr>th {
	background-color: #222!important;
	color: #FFF !important;
}

.seetickets-calendar-container table tbody tr>td, .seetickets-calendar-container table tbody tr>th {
	background-color: transparent!important;
	color: #FFF !important;

}

.seetickets-calendar td { background-color: transparent!important;}

.seetickets-calendar td .date-number,
.seetickets-calendar-year-month-container{ color:#FFF;}

.seetickets-calendar-event-container .calendar-body a {
	color: #FFF !important;
}
.seetickets-calendar-event-picture { aspect-ratio: 1/1; height: 100px !important; overflow: hidden; } 
.seetickets-calendar-event-picture img, .elementor .seetickets-calendar-event-picture img { height: 100px !important;  object-position:top;
	aspect-ratio: 1/1;
} 

@media (max-width:600px) {
	.event-info-block {
	max-width: 100%;
}
.list-view-events a.seetickets-buy-btn {
		width: 100%;
		display: inline-block;
		text-align: center;
	}

	.seetickets-list-event-container.grid-item { width: calc(100% - 2rem) !important; padding: 1rem; flex-direction: column!important; margin: 0 auto; justify-content: center; overflow: hidden; }

.grid-item .seetickets-list-view-event-image-container {
